detail: init objective="Extend generous image pipeline to all remaining Anthropic-family image paths: (wp1) /v1/messages native passthrough in claude-messages.ts gets normalizeAnthropicImages + guard wiring with server-harness tests; (wp2) kiro adapter gets researched CodeWhisperer/Bedrock image caps via generalized tier machinery from anthropic-image-normalize.ts (single owner, anthropic behavior unchanged).
